g.text: GC deferral · dirs · package.el off · macOS toolchain · early UI
straight.el · leaf · org · exec-path-from-shell · gcmh · personal overlay
ordered require · skip/extra hooks · per-module timing · error isolation
user.el · <login>.el · must not mutate earlier layers

svg.text: Dependency rule: upper layers may use lower; lower must never use upper
deterministic · explicit deps · layer ownership · delete-safe modules · public-API only · setopt for defcustom
anonymous lambdas in hooks → named defuns · defvar at top-level · eval-when-compile for compile-time-only requires
